query:
-- Get current user ID (assuming it's the owner/admin)
SET @user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE role = 'admin' LIMIT 1);

-- Insert payroll_batch_accountant_review permission
INSERT INTO user_permissions (user_id, permission, scope_type, scope_id)
VALUES (@user_id, 'payroll_batch_accountant_review', 'global', '*')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE permission = permission;

-- Insert payroll_batch_financial_review permission
INSERT INTO user_permissions (user_id, permission, scope_type, scope_id)
VALUES (@user_id, 'payroll_batch_financial_review', 'global', '*')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE permission = permission;

-- Insert payroll_batch_manager_review permission
INSERT INTO user_permissions (user_id, permission, scope_type, scope_id)
VALUES (@user_id, 'payroll_batch_manager_review', 'global', '*')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE permission = permission;

-- Show result
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.full_name, up.permission
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_permissions up ON u.id = up.user_id
WHERE u.id = @user_id;
